overrides.expect: \bigcap_ {n = 1} ^ {\infty} A _ {n} = \{p: \text {for each n we have p\in A_{n}} \}.

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \int_ {\varphi} d \alpha = \int_ {\partial \varphi} \alpha \quad \text {by Stokes^{\prime} Theorem on a cell} \\ = \int_ {\partial \varphi} T ^ {*} \alpha \quad \text { by   Equation(27) } \\ = \int_ {\varphi} d T ^ {*} \alpha \quad \text { by   Stokes'   Theorem   on   a   cell } \\ = \int_ {\varphi} T ^ {*} d \alpha \quad \text { by   (d)   in   Theorem   43 } \\ = 0 \qquad \mathrm{byStep2.} \\ \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} \int_ {\varphi} d \alpha = \int_ {\partial \varphi} \alpha \quad \text {by Stokes' Theorem on a cell} \\ = \int_ {\partial \varphi} T ^ {*} \alpha \quad \text { by   Equation(27) } \\ = \int_ {\varphi} d T ^ {*} \alpha \quad \text { by   Stokes'   Theorem   on   a   cell } \\ = \int_ {\varphi} T ^ {*} d \alpha \quad \text { by   (d)   in   Theorem   43 } \\ = 0 \qquad \mathrm{byStep2.} \\ \end{array}
